reviews.review_description: If your looking  for gameplay, there’s not much of a game to it. If you want roam a large surreal city with flying cars and random animals on every street corner, this is your app. You can grab a rocket and fly. You can use web-slingers to bound through the city like Spider-Man.  You can land on rooftops or climb walls  of buildings. Dinosaurs and sea creatures also appear at random. The controls can be awkward. If release the trigger, you will drop whatever your holding and good luck finding it. You will likely have to restart the game to find another rocket or web-slinger. The ‘game’ involves removing as many tagged bad creatures as you can in 2 minutes before you automatically respawn. I prefer free mode in which the game part is removed and you can roam as long as you want without timer. I also opted to turn off the music option, which can be grating after a while. For 99 cents the graphics are fun and there is a lot to explore. Sort of like a VR Toca Boca game with advanced graphics. Fun for a while. A nice escape.

I have played a few other ZOSU games, and they have been fun ways for a younger audience to try VR. This game is no different, but I actually found myself having a blast as an adult as well! There are a few different methods of locomotive (walking, flying, grapple webs) and they are all a ton of fun. Navigate the city however you want, save the animals, fight the baddies. It's a simple concept, but we'll executed! Menus could use some polish, but you'll forget after the gameplay.
The game has some interesting ideas but needs a lot of fleshing out. I liked the animals. I received it for free, I don't think it's at a point where it makes sense to charge money yet.

The dev's newer game, based in a weird ocean environment, is a better iteration on this idea, which is a sort of superhero-in-a-dreamscape concept with dodgy graphics but a compelling sense of wonder and reward for simply being in the space. Giant and often freaky creatures roam and for some reason you touch them and they disappear. Oddly bad but brilliant too. Worth the money? Definitely.
I just want to thank the Devs for doing a giveaway on the VR discord server, because without it I wouldn’t be able to play this game
The game is fun and colourful, but the movement is amazing. Jet packs and grappling feels so fun. Plus cute animals are always a bonus.

reviews.review_title: Great game but hard to learn
reviews.review_description: Its a very great game but I couldn't find out how to climb or grab.
Simple,and a little wierd.A pretty solid piece that just needs to work on falling physics.
Large amount of content for the price leaves me giving this experience 5 stars overall!

reviews.review_title: Pretty good but could use a lot of work.
reviews.review_description: I think the game is still a work in progress and i think the graphics and physics could use a little work. But other than that i think the game has a great concept and i love flying around with the thruster and grappling around.

As the game is at the current moment visual it is good. The jetpack work great and the climbing works good, with the normal learning curve. With that being said the game is still rudimentary, which has the amazing bonus that my young kids love it with the exploring and collecting animals. I look forward to seeing where this games goes as it is updated.

The big things I see with my limited playtime is that I feel like the jetpack should be a built in attribute not equitable, though I am ok with the packs being fuel.
The fighting mechanics at this time seem vague.
Also having a twist wrist status update of collected animals would be great.
A map system of some variety should also exist doesn't matter the form.

From my experience I would say this is a good game, don't really understand the concept of it (Mentioning the game is in very early development). The moving mechanics feel great, one thing I would say needs to be worked on are the grapples registering while they're equipped. Another thing to mention is the weapon mechanics, I would use the sword to chop things and it would not register. Other then that I would give it a 4 star rating. Looking to write more reviews on upcoming updates!
